text.title: MegaLinter as the Polyglot Quality Umbrella in CI Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: 8 lint jobs in CI; versions drift; output formats differ.
antipattern.root-cause: Each language added its own job over time.
antipattern.fix: Consolidate into MegaLinter; one job, one config.

antipattern.symptom: MegaLinter image pulled with :latest; behaviour changes between runs.
antipattern.fix: Pin to specific SHA; Renovate updates pin on a schedule.

antipattern.symptom: MegaLinter runs; findings disappear after run.
antipattern.fix: Add upload-sarif step; findings persist in security tab.
